OMNIPRESENCE.settings.dashboard.name: Omnipresence Sync
OMNIPRESENCE.settings.dashboard.label: Manage Sync
OMNIPRESENCE.settings.dashboard.hint: View and manage which characters are synchronized across worlds.
OMNIPRESENCE.dashboard.title: Omnipresence Sync
OMNIPRESENCE.dashboard.addViaContextMenu: To add characters, right-click them in the Actors Directory.
OMNIPRESENCE.notifications.syncFailed: Omnipresence: sync failed for {name}. Check the console for details.
OMNIPRESENCE.notifications.enrolledQueue: {name} marked for sync. Changes will upload when a GM connects.
OMNIPRESENCE.notifications.unsupportedSy: Omnipresence: character sync is not available for the "{system}" game system.
OMNIPRESENCE.userConfig.macroSyncHint: Synchronize hotbar macros/chat commands across worlds
OMNIPRESENCE.userConfig.journalSyncHint: Synchronize journal entries (including Campaign Record / Monk's Enhanced Journal) across worlds
OMNIPRESENCE.notifications.missingModule: Omnipresence: some synced journals need these modules for full fidelity: {modules}
OMNIPRESENCE.notifications.worldLocalMed: Omnipresence: some synced journal media use world-local paths that may not load in other worlds.
OMNIPRESENCE.notifications.manageFailed: Omnipresence could not update your synced documents. See the console for details.
OMNIPRESENCE.notifications.manageSavedSy: Synced documents updated. Newly added documents are syncing now.
Synced documents updated. Newly added documents will be imported at the next GM login.
OMNIPRESENCE.notifications.manageSavedRe: Your synced document selection was saved, but syncing the newly added documents failed. See the console for details.
OMNIPRESENCE.userConfig.manageDocsHint: Choose which of your characters and journals sync into this world.
OMNIPRESENCE.onboarding.title: Omnipresence — Sync in This World?
OMNIPRESENCE.onboarding.intro: This world hasn't synced with your Omnipresence characters before. Choose what to bring into this world. You can change categories later in your User Configuration, and add or remove individual documents with the right-click Enroll/Unenroll menu.
OMNIPRESENCE.onboarding.macrosLabel: Sync my hotbar macros in this world
OMNIPRESENCE.onboarding.noneActors: No Omnipresence characters found for you.
OMNIPRESENCE.onboarding.noneJournals: No Omnipresence journals found for you.
OMNIPRESENCE.onboarding.manageIntro: Choose which of your characters and journals sync into this world. Unchecking a document leaves it untouched here — it simply stops syncing, and you can re-check it at any time.
